verses.text: At a marriage in Cana the wine fails; His mother says, 'They have no wine.' Need brought to Him. He is welcome at the joys of common life.
At a marriage in Cana the wine fails; His mother says, 'They have no wine.' Need brought to Him. He is welcome at the joys of common life.
At a marriage in Cana the wine fails; His mother says, 'They have no wine.' Need brought to Him. He is welcome at the joys of common life.
'Mine hour is not yet come'; she tells the servants, 'Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it.' Wise counsel. Obedience to Christ is the way to His blessing.
'Mine hour is not yet come'; she tells the servants, 'Whatsoever he saith unto you, do it.' Wise counsel. Obedience to Christ is the way to His blessing.
He bids them fill six waterpots with water and draw out. Simple obedience. Great wonders begin with doing what He says.
He bids them fill six waterpots with water and draw out. Simple obedience. Great wonders begin with doing what He says.
He bids them fill six waterpots with water and draw out. Simple obedience. Great wonders begin with doing what He says.
The water is made wine, the best kept till last; this first miracle 'manifested forth his glory.' Glory shown. Christ's first sign reveals His creative power.
The water is made wine, the best kept till last; this first miracle 'manifested forth his glory.' Glory shown. Christ's first sign reveals His creative power.
The water is made wine, the best kept till last; this first miracle 'manifested forth his glory.' Glory shown. Christ's first sign reveals His creative power.
He goes to Capernaum, then up to Jerusalem at the passover. On the move. He keeps the appointed feasts of God.
He goes to Capernaum, then up to Jerusalem at the passover. On the move. He keeps the appointed feasts of God.
He drives the traders from the temple, 'make not my Father's house an house of merchandise.' Holy zeal. He will not have worship turned to gain.
He drives the traders from the temple, 'make not my Father's house an house of merchandise.' Holy zeal. He will not have worship turned to gain.
He drives the traders from the temple, 'make not my Father's house an house of merchandise.' Holy zeal. He will not have worship turned to gain.
They remember, 'The zeal of thine house hath eaten me up'; 'destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.' Veiled word. He foretells His death and rising.
They remember, 'The zeal of thine house hath eaten me up'; 'destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.' Veiled word. He foretells His death and rising.
They remember, 'The zeal of thine house hath eaten me up'; 'destroy this temple, and in three days I will raise it up.' Veiled word. He foretells His death and rising.
He spoke of His body; after His rising the disciples remembered and believed. Understood later. Time and the resurrection unfold His meaning.
He spoke of His body; after His rising the disciples remembered and believed. Understood later. Time and the resurrection unfold His meaning.
He spoke of His body; after His rising the disciples remembered and believed. Understood later. Time and the resurrection unfold His meaning.
Many believe at His miracles, but He commits not Himself, 'for he knew what was in man.' Searching eye. Christ knows the heart's true state.
Many believe at His miracles, but He commits not Himself, 'for he knew what was in man.' Searching eye. Christ knows the heart's true state.
